rawIntent:
[Feature: Build the leave management module — Phase 2: Implement leave service logic]

Create src/modules/leave/leave.service.ts to implement business logic for handling leave requests, including validation and processing. This phase depends on src/modules/leave/leave.model.ts and src/modules/leave/leave.repository.ts from Phase 1.

This phase depends on: src/modules/leave/leave.model.ts, src/modules/leave/leave.repository.ts.

Phase architecture notes:
This phase encapsulates the business rules and logic for leave management.

successCriteria.description: The leave service logic is implemented and can handle leave requests with proper validation and processing.

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces.
Audit records: All state-changing operations write an audit record.
Input validation: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing.
RBAC enforcement: All API endpoints enforce role-based access control.
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled.
